query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals) AS deals_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deal_versions) AS versions_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log) AS audit_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS users_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orgs) AS orgs_count;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jz1YpzQCSkhpMn.22dced80cd42 --database KQxG4oGcxF7TcvFNpiFwWu --execute SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals) AS deals_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deal_versions) AS versions_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log) AS audit_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS users_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orgs) AS orgs_count;
